info.name: Paid sharing
付费分享
info.summary: Paid file sharing — save to cloud, Stripe, PayPal, Alipay, and revenue dashboard
付费文件分享 — 站内转存、Stripe、PayPal、支付宝与收益统计
info.description:
Create paid public links for files in Nextcloud. After payment, buyers can download the file or **save it to their account on this server** (same-instance save to cloud).
**Dashboard**: Your shares · Paid shares · Account binding · Revenue (preview, save-to-cloud, and download counts)
- **Save to cloud**: logged-in buyers copy purchased files into their `ShareGate/` folder - Alipay Face-to-Face (sandbox or production), Stripe Checkout, and PayPal Checkout - Seller dashboard in the Nextcloud sidebar - No separate ShareGate server required
Compatible with Nextcloud 28–33.

在 Nextcloud 内为网盘文件创建付费外链。买家支付后可下载文件，或**转存到本站 Nextcloud 账户**（同一实例站内转存）。
**管理台四页**：你的共享 · 付费分享 · 账户绑定 · 收益查看（预览 / 转存 / 下载）
- **站内转存**：已登录买家将已购文件复制到网盘 `ShareGate/` 目录 - 支付宝当面付（沙箱/生产）、Stripe Checkout、PayPal Checkout - 卖家管理台融入 NC 全局侧栏 - 无需单独部署 ShareGate 服务
兼容 Nextcloud 28–33。
info.author: abitlea
